case_title: GUILLEN, CECILIA vs. BROGLIA, PIERO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, CECILIA AS TO DEFENDANT BROGLIA, PIERO BROGLIA, MONICA DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-19-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-29-1993

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO REMOVE CASE FROM THE CASE MANAGEMENT PLAN RULE 1.1(C) IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THIS CASE NOT BE SUBJECT TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT PLAN. STATUS CONFERENCE OF 19-OCT-93 IS VACATED AND RESCHEDULED FOR 21-MAR-94, PLAINTIFF SHALL GIVE NOTICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, CECILIA
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-19-1993, CONTINUED TO MAR-21-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PER COURT ORDER DATED 7/9/93. PLAINTIFF SHALL GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Off Calendar Mar-10-1994 Sweep; Adjudicated
